description: CompositionGrey sweatshirt made of 95% cotton and 5% viscose, has a round ribbed neck, long raglan sleeves and branding appliquéd on the frontFitRegularWash careMachine wash separately inside out with like colours in warm water and using a mild detergentTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsKeep cosy on those chilly evenings with this stylish sweatshirt from wrangler. The soft fabric is comfortable against your skin and gives you insulation against the elements. This is an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it as a top layer over your Sports kit or over a T-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look.Model statisticsThe product is a a size XL on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
